sections.abandonment_condition: After two rounds of calibration the combined model fails to beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points or fails to meet the useful-improvement threshold (MAPE <= 25%; >= 75% within 30%; >= 75% bottleneck accuracy).
citations: arXiv 2603.05451v1 — FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling.
arXiv 2605.04178v1 — white-box GPU performance modeling methodology.
arXiv 2512.02189v1 — Blackwell microbenchmarks (SMEM 128 B/clock/SM, MUFU 16 ops/clock/SM).
sections.comparator_relation: The selected route is a direct child of the accepted baseline (artifact-ACCEPTED_BASELINE_RECORD-e673ec2be9b4). It preserves the white-box structure and adds the B200-specific terms the baseline explicitly caveats as missing.
sections.expected_effect: Held-out MAPE drops from the baseline value to <= 25%; >= 75% of validation configs are within 30% absolute error; >= 75% bottleneck labels match the dominant measured NCU counter regime.

experiment_ready_brief.expected_outcome: Combined analytical predictor beats the FA4 paper roofline baseline by >= 5 percentage points MAPE and meets the useful-improvement threshold.
failure_criteria: Combined model does not beat baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points after two calibration rounds.
Combined model fails the useful-improvement threshold.
inputs: Calibration split (~20% of synthetic configuration matrix) with measured B200 runtime and NCU counters.
Held-out validation split (~20%) with measured B200 runtime and NCU counters.
Accepted baseline predictor code and constants.
FA4 source tile sizes and launch parameters from repos/extern/flash-attention @ 002cce0.
success_criteria: delta MAPE vs baseline >= 5 percentage points improvement

sections.falsification: If the combined predictor, after calibration on the calibration split, does not beat the baseline MAPE by >= 5 percentage points on the held-out validation set, the hypothesis is falsified.
sections.hypothesis: A white-box forward-pass predictor that explicitly models (i) occupancy-limited active warps per SM, (ii) effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth as a function of transfer size and access pattern, and (iii) precision-specific MMA and MUFU throughput, will achieve held-out MAPE <= 25% and beat the FA4 paper roofline baseline by at least 5 percentage points MAPE on the B200 held-out validation set.
sections.mechanism: The FA4 roofline bounds runtime by max(MMA FLOPs/peak, SMEM bytes/peak, exponential ops/peak). On B200 the actual runtime is larger because peak throughput is only reachable at sufficient occupancy and because HBM/L2/TMA transfers are not perfectly efficient. We add a multiplicative occupancy factor to each throughput term and replace peak HBM bandwidth with an effective bandwidth curve calibrated on transfer size; precision is handled via per-precision Tensor Core and MUFU rates instead of a single FLOP constant.
sections.minimal_test: Implement predictor.py in topic.repos.main with modular terms; calibrate constants on the calibration split; evaluate MAPE, max APE, 30%-error coverage, and bottleneck-label accuracy on held-out validation; compare to baseline predictor.
sections.pitch: Extend the accepted FlashAttention-4 paper roofline baseline for B200 by adding tile-size-dependent occupancy, effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth, and precision-specific Tensor Core MMA/exponential throughput terms. The resulting analytical predictor should reduce held-out MAPE of predicted_runtime_ms and meet the useful-improvement threshold.
sections.risk: The dominant error source may be implementation-specific scheduling or launch overhead that a white-box model cannot capture, in which case the additions will not move MAPE materially.
sections.summary: Extend the accepted FlashAttention-4 paper roofline baseline for B200 by adding tile-size-dependent occupancy, effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth, and precision-specific Tensor Core MMA/exponential throughput terms.
sections.title: Selected hypothesis: combined predictor

summary: Selected hypothesis for the FlashAttention-4 B200 white-box runtime model.
title: Selected Hypothesis: Combined Occupancy/TMA-L2/Precision Analytical Predictor
